languages.text: "Это они. Это они. Это все они! Я лишь выполнял приказ!"

traits.locale_text: "Это они. Это они. Это все они! Я лишь выполнял приказ!"

languages.text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"
languages.original_text: "Это они. Это они. Это все они! Я лишь выполнял приказ!"

traits.locale_text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"
"It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"
"It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"

languages.text: "Sie waren es. Sie waren es. Sie alle! Ich habe nur Befehle befolgt!"
languages.original_text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"

traits.locale_text: "Sie waren es. Sie waren es. Sie alle! Ich habe nur Befehle befolgt!"

languages.text: “是他们。是他们干的！所有人都有份！我只是奉命行事而已！”
languages.original_text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"

traits.locale_text: “是他们。是他们干的！所有人都有份！我只是奉命行事而已！”

languages.text: « C'était eux. C'était eux. C'était eux ! Je ne faisais que suivre les ordres! »
languages.original_text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"

traits.locale_text: « C'était eux. C'était eux. C'était eux ! Je ne faisais que suivre les ordres! »

languages.text: «Fueron ellos. Fueron ellos. ¡Todos ellos! ¡Yo solo cumplía órdenes!».
languages.original_text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"

traits.locale_text: «Fueron ellos. Fueron ellos. ¡Todos ellos! ¡Yo solo cumplía órdenes!».

languages.text: "Onlar. Onlar yüzünden. Hepsi onların suçu! Ben sadece emirleri uyguluyordum!"
languages.original_text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"

traits.locale_text: "Onlar. Onlar yüzünden. Hepsi onların suçu! Ben sadece emirleri uyguluyordum!"

languages.text: 「彼らだ。彼らだ。全員だ！私はただ命令に従っていただけだ！」
languages.original_text: "It was them. It was them. It was all of them! I was only following orders!"

traits.locale_text: 「彼らだ。彼らだ。全員だ！私はただ命令に従っていただけだ！」
